title: Marcus Makes Morning Music
synopsis: Baby Marcus discovers the delightful sounds of a lazy Sunday morning with his family, from clapping hands to sizzling pancakes.

pages.text: Marcus wakes up! Clap, clap, clap go his tiny hands.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits up in his crib wearing soft blue pajamas, clapping his hands together in golden morning sunlight streaming through the window
illustration.alt: Baby Marcus clapping hands in his crib

pages.text: Tap, tap, tap go Daddy's feet down the hall.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes peeks through crib bars as his father walks by in striped pajamas, sunlit hallway with warm golden light
illustration.alt: Marcus watching daddy walk down the hall

pages.text: Sizzle, pop, sizzle! Mama makes pancakes in the kitchen.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes being carried by his mother in a cozy kitchen with pancakes cooking on the stove, golden morning light filling the room
illustration.alt: Marcus and mama in kitchen with pancakes cooking

pages.text: Marcus giggles. He loves all the happy morning sounds with his family!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sitting in his high chair laughing while his parents smile nearby, newspapers and pancakes on the table in warm Sunday morning light
illustration.alt: Marcus laughing with his family at breakfast

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do Marcus's hands make?
questions.explanation: Marcus claps his hands and they go clap, clap, clap!

questions.question: What is Mama making in the kitchen?
questions.explanation: Mama is making pancakes that sizzle and pop on the stove!

questions.question: How does Marcus feel about the morning sounds?
questions.explanation: Marcus giggles and loves all the happy morning sounds!
